title: Looking for Category Manager at GKB Opticals

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at GKB Opticals
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Category Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
